allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'decoder_ingest' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8000,8010,8020 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess)
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 33584 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 8010 })
